ProggyClean.ttf

Author: Tristan Grimmer
License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/bluescan/proggyfonts

SND vendors ProggyClean as the base text font for the pure retained OpenGL
renderer. This matches Dear ImGui's 13 px default bitmap-style face closely
enough for SND's current UI vocabulary while keeping the non-ImGui path on a
repo-owned font asset.

Dear ImGui's font documentation records the same provenance:
"ProggyClean.ttf, by Tristan Grimmer" and "MIT License".
